transcript.text:
[Today's mukbang: Mafia Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake)] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[But what's this...?]
[Honey Butter?]
[I put my life on the line for this]
This is so good
[Let's fall into the honey butter scent]
This is better than rosé
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some tteokboki today (spicy rice cake)
There are a lot of different flavors of tteokboki
Like rosé flavor, cream flavor, etc
I've been invited to try South Korea's very first honey butter tteokboki
I'm very nervous because it's my first time
I'm very curious to find out
[Over here]
[Mafia Tteokboki] [Main Location]

This is Mafia Tteokboki's HQ
I'm going to eat here at the 1st floor
I'm going to try that new flavor
[Let's see the menu]
[Lots of other dishes than Honey Butter Tteokboki]
1 honey butter,
I will have to try their main dish too
1 mafia tteokboki, 1 honey butter,
-Seaweed roll, squid, cheese sticks, -Just a sec...
King shrimp, fried boiled egg, cheese balls, fried fishcake, fried galbi mandu (grilled rib dumplings)
-You're eating all of that? -Yes
Glass noodles add-ons, Cheese as well, please
[Checking with her again]
For our spice levels,
The honey butter has mild, medium, and spicy
The regular one has 5 levels

Level 1 is spicier than Shin Ramyun noodles?
Then level 0
-You can choose the sugar levels too -Really? That's cool
I get it as regular because I don't like it too sweet
-Would you like to do that? -Yes, please
[Honey butter smell from the kitchen]
[While we wait for the tteokboki...]
[He seems familiar...]
[Mukbang YouTuber Sanghyuk]
[He's close with the owner here]
[He already filmed a mukbang here before]
How much did you eat last time you were here?
-1 plate -Oh, 1 plate?
-He's just a big eater -Tzuyang can eat way more than me
[Compliments each other]
-May I please get a photo if you don't mind -I would like one as well

I don't get to meet YouTubers
[Both are starstruck]
[Photo time]
[Selfie for me...]
[His sister wants 1 too]
[She looks happy...]
Thank you
[Mission accomplished] I will head out now
-I just came to say hello -Do you live nearby?
[He came a long way to see her]
This would be my only chance to see you
She's a senior mukbanger
[Senior vibes]
Is that running?
Guys, Tzuyang is really damn pretty
I was shocked

[Thank you for the laughs!] [Subscribe to his channel!]
[The food is here]
Thank you
It smells really nice
[Now for the visuals...!]
[Looks like gopchang... (intestines)] Oh no, I want to make it look pretty
No
This is difficult
Oh no!
It's ruined
It's really hard to make it look pretty
Bon appetit
I'll try the new menu first
It's honey butter flavor
It smells really good
Looks good

Some rice cake first
Wait, this is...
So good
Really good
Wow, this is not cream nor rosé
It's very nutty
Honey scent with buttery flavors
Really good
I've never had anything like it
This is better than rosé
Wait, I wanted to try the regular one too Let me have some more of this
Sausage
The sausage tastes good!
With the noodles
[Hot hot]
Flat glass noodles add-on is a must! Really

It has that same sweet smell
I'll try the regular one too
After this bite
That's really good
This is just what I like
This can't go wrong
Personally,
These 3~4 serving bowls are popular, right?
This is the best out of those
I'm not saying this because it's an ad
The rice cake is soft
With fishcake and rice cake
The tteokboki sauce is really tasty
Better than my restaurant
[Jungwon Bunsik workers will be salty...]
The thickness and seasoning are all just about right

These are so big
Big fried squid
Longer than my face
Dip it
It should go well together
The sauce goes well with fried food
This is very long too I guess that's the trend now
[Oh my]
[Please hold onto the cheese stick..]
[The cheese pull]
[Endless cheese]
I'm very satisfied
That's a real cheese stick
There was 1 near my house
I'm going to order delivery
The glass noodles go really well together

[A perfect combo]
Galbi mandu (grilled rib dumplings)
[You can never go wrong with Galbi Mandu]
[Lots of sauce]
They said these are popular as well (seaweed roll)
[With honey butter sauce]
That's so good
There's a reason why it's popular This is the best one
The glass noodles inside are very chewy
Wow, it's delicious
[With red sauce too]
Honey butter
Wow, this is
I've never had 2 big bowls of these tteokbokis before
I think?
Because 1 big bowl of this will get you sick of the same flavors So I usually order some sides with 1 bowl

But I can keep eating this
You can choose the spice level and also the sugar level
This is at 50%
And I think it's perfect I guess you can have it sweeter since this is honey butter
Do you use real honey?
Yes, we use real honey
I can taste it more now that I know it
Fried king shrimp too
You're so good at eating
I can never do that...
It's really good I'm going to have these delivered from home now
We announced this new flavor just yesterday
We wanted to beat the (censored) company
We wanted to bring them down
The color is similar to rosé sauce
I thought it'd taste similar too, but it's very different

The honey and butter smell is very fragrant The smell itself is very sweet
[Very satisfied]
[She's taking the sauce home again...]
[What a gentleman]
[A little too much]
[That too?]
I will cherish this as a family heirloom
Store this in the freezer
Let's mix the red and honey butter sauces
[Delicious+Delicious?]
It's tasty
[New flavor?]
Too hardened
But still good
With rice cake
I can eat 2 bowls of this

[How though?]
I love how there's no cabbage in here
We don't use vegetables
I love it
[Because it changes flavors]
A lot of Vienna sausages
3 of them
Fried boiled egg
You can't forget about this one
[The fried boiled egg goes so well with tteokboki]
You must have this added on
It's the owner
-The new flavor is so delicious -The new one?
You think we can beat (censored) company
No, but honestly How is it?
It's really good

I thought it would taste like rosé But it's different
Anything to improve on?
No, this is good as it is Perfect
[Yes, we can do it!]
I'm also a big eater I eat up to 12 packs of ramyun noodles
You can do mukbang too
[A collaboration?]
It's really delicious The best
The sauce goes well with this
The cheese stick is so long that it's never-ending
Fishcake
Tteokboki usually gets salty after a while But this is seasoned so well
Not much left
Makes you curious, right?
When I first heard Honey Butter Tteokboki...
I don't want the sauce to go to waste

Add some pasta noodles?
That should be good
Owner: Did you hear that?
She wants pasta noodles
What? No no no
How about some udon noodles instead?
Put in whatever she asks for
Did I hear that right?
I think that sounds good
The cheese is too hardened
What is this?
Why did you make the cheese like that?
[Social life is hard...]
[Overcome] Thank you
Hardened cheese is good too
[Where did all the tteokboki go?]

It's really honey butter now that it's cold
Tastes really good... Even better now
I want to break up some boiled eggs in here
-Do you have boiled eggs already made? -We do
May I have just 2?
Half-soft-boiled?
[This crazy tteokboki+boiled egg combination]
You'll regret it if you don't eat boiled eggs like this
The color is yellow-ish
They used clean oil to fry this
Glass noodles
[Finished]
[Is this real life...?]
It was really delicious it was the best
The owner and the staff said that they put poured their lives onto this honey butter tteokboki
It was something I never had before

But the honey and butter scents were very fragrant
It's so good that I want to eat it again
Thanks everyone
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Yangji Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
